headlines.headline: Nerval Biopharma faces class action over wireless connectivity service disruption

sentiment.reasoning: A class action lawsuit regarding service disruption creates immediate negative sentiment and potential financial liability.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
